Hub Home > Design & Branding > Website Accessibility Audit

Website Accessibility Audit

Audit your website or app for accessibility issues — WCAG 2.1 compliance, screen reader compatibility, keyboard navigation, color contrast, form usability, and alt text. Outputs a categorized issue list with severity, fix instructions, and a remediation priority roadmap. Helps avoid lawsuits and reach more customers.

Intermediate STEP BY STEP Cost-saving
Pro tip

Describe your site page by page, or paste the HTML/content. Include your color palette HEX codes — contrast ratio failures are the most common and easiest to fix.

accessibility WCAG a11y audit ADA compliance inclusive design screen reader

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a web accessibility specialist conducting a WCAG 2.1 AA audit.

<site_details>
Website URL or description: [URL, or describe the site page by page — layout, navigation, forms, images,...
You are a web accessibility specialist conducting a WCAG 2.1 AA audit.

<site_details>
Website URL or description: [URL, or describe the site page by page — layout, navigation, forms, images,...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a web accessibility specialist conducting a WCAG 2.1 AA audit.

<site_details>
Website URL or description: [URL, or describe the site page by page — layout, navigation, forms, images, interactive elements]
Tech stack: [WordPress / Shopify / custom React / Squarespace / other]
Color palette: [HEX codes for background, text, buttons, links, accents]
Font sizes: [body text size, heading sizes if known]
Forms on site: [list any forms — contact, checkout, signup, search]
Media: [videos, audio, animations, carousels present?]
Current accessibility efforts: [anything already done, or "nothing"]
</site_details>

Conduct a comprehensive accessibility audit:

1. **Color contrast check** — evaluate every color combination against WCAG AA minimums (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text). List every failing pair with current ratio and suggested fix.

2. **Keyboard navigation** — can a user navigate the entire site without a mouse? Tab order logic, focus indicators, skip-to-content links, modal/dropdown keyboard traps.

3. **Screen reader compatibility** — heading hierarchy (H1→H2→H3 in order?), landmark regions (nav, main, footer), ARIA labels on interactive elements, image alt text quality.

4. **Form accessibility** — label associations, error messaging, required field indicators, input types, autocomplete attributes.

5. **Media accessibility** — video captions, audio transcripts, animation pause controls, auto-play issues.

6. **Responsive & touch** — touch target sizes (minimum 44×44px), text scaling, zoom support, content reflow.

7. **Issue summary table:**
   | Issue | WCAG Criterion | Severity (Critical/Major/Minor) | Fix Difficulty (Easy/Medium/Hard) | Fix Instructions |

8. **Remediation roadmap** — prioritized by: severity × fix difficulty. Phase 1 (critical + easy — do this week), Phase 2 (major — next 30 days), Phase 3 (minor — ongoing improvement).

9. **Quick wins** — 5 changes that take under 30 minutes each and make the biggest impact.

10. **Legal context** — one paragraph on ADA/accessibility lawsuit risk for businesses your size. Not legal advice, but awareness.
Notes: Claude provides thorough, well-organized audits. Paste actual HEX codes for precise contrast ratio calculations. For the most complete audit, describe every page template (home, product, checkout, contact) separately.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a web accessibility specialist. Audit my site for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

Site: [URL or detailed description]
Tech: [WordPress / Shopify / React / Squarespace / other]
Colors:...

Tech: [WordPress / Shopify / React / Squarespace / other]

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a web accessibility specialist. Audit my site for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

Site: [URL or detailed description]
Tech: [WordPress / Shopify / React / Squarespace / other]
Colors: [HEX codes — background, text, buttons, links, accents]
Font sizes: [body and heading sizes]
Forms: [list any forms]
Media: [videos, audio, animations, carousels?]
Current a11y work: [what is done or "nothing"]

Audit:
1. Color contrast — every failing pair with ratio and fix
2. Keyboard navigation — tab order, focus, skip links, traps
3. Screen reader — heading order, landmarks, ARIA, alt text
4. Form accessibility — labels, errors, required fields
5. Media — captions, transcripts, pause controls
6. Touch/responsive — target sizes, zoom, reflow
7. Issue table: issue | WCAG criterion | severity | difficulty | fix
8. Remediation roadmap — phased by severity × difficulty
9. 5 quick wins under 30 minutes each
10. Legal awareness paragraph
Notes: ChatGPT with web browsing can visit your URL and identify visible issues. For contrast checks, paste your exact HEX codes — it will calculate ratios precisely. Follow up with "Write the CSS fixes for all contrast failures."

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Audit my website for accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA).

**Site:** [URL or description]
**Tech:** [platform]
**Colors:** [HEX codes]
**Fonts:** [sizes]
**Forms:** [list]
**Media:** [video/audio/animations?]
**Current efforts:** [done or "nothing"]

Visit my URL if provided and research current WCAG 2.1 AA requirements, then audit:
1. Color contrast failures with ratios and fixes
2. Keyboard navigation
3. Screen reader compatibility
4. Form accessibility
5. Media accessibility
6. Touch/responsive
7. Issue table with severity and fix difficulty
8. Phased remediation roadmap
9. 5 quick wins
10. Legal awareness for businesses my size

Cite specific WCAG success criteria for each issue.
Notes: Gemini can visit your live URL and cross-reference against the latest WCAG guidelines. It can also check your platform (Shopify, WordPress) for known accessibility plugins and suggest the best ones.

Audit my website for WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility.

Site: [URL or description]
Tech: [platform]
Colors: [HEX codes]
Fonts: [sizes]
Forms: [list]
Media: [video/audio/animations]
Current work: [done or "nothing"]

Audit:
1. Color contrast failures and fixes
2. Keyboard navigation
3. Screen reader compatibility
4. Form accessibility
5. Media accessibility
6. Touch/responsive
7. Issue table: issue | criterion | severity | difficulty | fix
8. Remediation roadmap
9. 5 quick wins
10. Legal context
Notes: Copilot in Edge can analyze the page you have open. For the remediation roadmap, ask Copilot to create a Planner board with phases as buckets and each fix as a task with due dates.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the Website Accessibility Audit prompt do?

Audit your website or app for accessibility issues — WCAG 2.1 compliance, screen reader compatibility, keyboard navigation, color contrast, form usability, and alt text. Outputs a categorized issue list with severity, fix instructions, and a remediation priority roadmap. Helps avoid lawsuits and reach more customers.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
